text: Vision: "IT for Masses". Keeping in mind the interest of IT professionals and computer users, CSI works towards making the profession an area of choice amongst all sections of society. CSI regularly organizes conferences, conventions, lectures, projects, and awards. It also provides training for physically challenged citizens ('Punarjani') and assists governments in formulating IT strategy and planning.
Covers: Tamil Nadu, Pondicherry, Andaman and Nicobar, Kerala, Lakshadweep.

The Society has developed a well-established network across the country. Activities for students include lecture meetings, seminars, conferences, training programs, programming contests, and industrial visits. CSI's Educational Directorate undertakes certification of professionals on the latest technologies and offers distance education in Business Domain areas.
- College received Best Supporting College (SBC) award from CSI Kancheepuram Chapter. - Faculty Mr. D. Weslin received Active Participant Award (SBC) from CSI Kancheepuram Chapter.

The IEEE is a United States-based non-profit organization and the world's leading professional association for the advancement of technology. It covers areas ranging from aerospace systems, electrical, electronics, computers, telecommunications, biomedical engineering, electric power, and consumer electronics. IEEE publishes technical literature and highly qualified research articles across all engineering domains.

metadata.topic: IEEE — Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers

text: - Participation in regional conferences, workshops and competitions - Development of leadership, interpersonal and team building skills - Scholarships and project/design programs and student paper contests - Establishment of a Student Branch Library with IEEE publications - Access to IEEE online services and resources; establish a website - Organize various awareness programs for school students and public.

IETE is one of the leading Professional Societies in India for Electronics and Communication Engineers. MSAJCE established its IETE Students Forum on 16/08/2017 with 100 active members. The forum organizes guest lectures, seminars, workshops, and conferences. Student members benefit from technical visits, practical training, and project work in R&D laboratories and industries.

metadata.topic: IETE — Institution of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineers

text: - IETE Journal of Education - IETE Journal of Research - IETE Technical Review.

- Improving the standard of education - Train students in emerging areas to meet new opportunities - Encouraging outside-the-classroom studies, practical work and seminars - Better employment of students on completion of their courses - Substantial increase of IETE membership and nationwide distribution.

- Priority for publishing papers in Journal of Education - Can subscribe to IETE Journal of Research and IETE Technical Review (available online) - ISF students can attend IETE technical programs in India at reduced registration fees - ISF members are issued with an Identity Card.

1. Signal and Power Integrity in Semiconductor Industry, Mr. Zakir Hussain, 27-06-2020, Participants: 65. 2. Cyber Physical Systems and Applications using LABVIEW, Mr. K. Prakash, 24/06/20, Participants: 77. 3. Art of Thinking Big, Mr. Aadil Ibrahim A, 11/06/20, Participants: 263. 4. Embedded & IoT Boot Camp, 27–29/05/20, Participants: 120. 5. Scope of Electronics Engineer in Various Domains, Mr. Sankaralingam and Mrs. Suganya, 30/01/2019, Participants: 70.

SAE is a US-based, globally active professional association and standards developing organization for engineering professionals. Principal emphasis is placed on global transport industries such as aerospace, automotive, and commercial vehicles. SAEINDIA is India's leading resource for mobility technology, operating across four sections: Northern, Eastern, Southern, and Western.

- Tractor Design Competition - BAJA SAE India - Supra SAEIndia - Aero Design Challenge - SAE India Student Convention - SAE India Bicycle Design Competition - SAE India ASOP - Electric Two Wheeler Design Competition - SAE India TIFAN - SAE India Efficycle.
Inaugurated on 21.02.2020 with office bearers: President: Syed N. Zaheer Abbas, Vice President: Chandrasekar G, Secretary: Muhammed Zahan Faaieq J, Joint Secretary: Shahila P, Treasurer: Abdullah B.

Founded in 1981 at New Delhi by a group of eminent HVAC&R professionals. It operates from 41 chapters and sub-chapters spread all over India. ISHRAE works with various Govt. Ministries/Departments and is looked upon as a repository of technical knowledge in HVAC&R and Building Industry field.

metadata.topic: ISHRAE — Indian Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air Conditioning Engineers

text: - Sustainability - Green Buildings - Energy Efficiency - Environmental Responsibility - Indoor Air Quality - Fire & Safety.

- Excellent networking opportunities to interact with professionals - Forum for professional development and training - Access to ISHRAE Technical Publications, Workshops, Conferences and Training Programs - Opportunity to work in Chapter Working Committee.
